queries.question: For each development program, list the topics studied.
queries.sql: select professional_development_programs.program_name , topics.topic_name from Professional_Development_Programs_Topics join Topics on Professional_Development_Programs_Topics.topics_id = Topics.id join Professional_Development_Programs on Professional_Development_Programs_Topics.pdp_topics_id = Professional_Development_Programs.program_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?program_name ?topic_name WHERE {
  ?professional_development_programs_topics a :Professional_Development_Programs_Topics .
  ?topics a :Topics .
  ?professional_development_programs_topics p:hasTopics ?topics .
  ?professional_development_programs a :Professional_Development_Programs .
  ?professional_development_programs_topics p:hasProfessional_Development_Programs ?professional_development_programs .
  ?professional_development_programs p:program_name ?program_name .
  ?topics p:topic_name ?topic_name .
}

queries.question: Show me the topics each development program has.
queries.sql: SELECT Topics.topic_name  from Professional_Development_Programs_Topics join Topics on Professional_Development_Programs_Topics.topics_id = Topics.id join Professional_Development_Programs on Professional_Development_Programs_Topics.pdp_topics_id = Professional_Development_Programs.program_id   GROUP BY Professional_Development_Programs_Topics.topics_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Professional_Development_Programs_Topics.pdp_topics_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Professional_Development_Programs)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the topics each development program has.
